top_stories.title: Okta Stock Soars 18% on Strong Q1 Earnings Beat and AI Identity Security Momentum
top_stories.summary: Okta's stock rose 18% following a strong Q1 earnings beat, driven by demand for AI-related identity security offerings. The results reflect revenue growth and reinforce Okta's position as a major vendor in the identity security market.

top_stories.title: VU#780781: Casdoor contains multiple authentication bypass and access management vulnerabilities
top_stories.summary: Casdoor versions 2.362.0 and earlier contain multiple authentication bypass and privilege escalation vulnerabilities related to SAML processing. The flaws enable broad authentication bypass and access management compromise in the open-source IAM platform.

top_stories.title: With Complex Cloud Integrations, Small Errors Lead to Major Compromises
top_stories.summary: Security researchers discovered an exploit chain in a popular automation service that combined over-permissioned roles, secrets discovery, and non-human identities to achieve potential full compromise. The attack vector highlights risks associated with excessive privilege assignment and non-human identity (NHI) management in complex cloud environments.

top_stories.title: Google Chrome adds session cookie theft protection for all users
top_stories.summary: Google has made its Device Bound Session Credentials (DBSC) feature generally available in Chrome, rolling it out to all users. DBSC protects against session cookie theft by cryptographically binding session credentials to a specific device, preventing attackers from using stolen cookies to take over accounts.

top_stories.title: Hackers exploit FortiClient EMS flaw to push infostealer malware
top_stories.summary: Hackers are actively exploiting an authentication bypass vulnerability (CVE-2026-35616) in FortiClient Enterprise Management Server (EMS) to deliver a credential-stealing malware called EKZ. The attack leverages the authentication bypass flaw to gain unauthorized access and deploy an undocumented infostealer targeting credentials.

news.title: PAN-OS GlobalProtect Authentication Bypass (CVE-2026-0257) Under Active Exploitation
news.summary: Palo Alto Networks has disclosed an authentication bypass vulnerability (CVE-2026-0257, CVSS 7.8) in PAN-OS GlobalProtect and Prisma Access that is being actively exploited in the wild. The flaw allows attackers to bypass authentication and establish unauthorized VPN connections.

news.title: Okta (OKTA) Hits 4-Year High as Earnings Soar
news.summary: Okta's stock price reached a four-year high following strong earnings results. The price surge reflects positive investor sentiment around the identity management vendor's financial performance.

news.title: New infostealer reaches enterprise devices through FortiClient EMS vulnerability
news.summary: Attackers are exploiting CVE-2026-35616, an improper access control vulnerability in FortiClient Enterprise Management Server (EMS), to deliver an infostealer malware to enterprise devices. The malicious payload was disguised as a Fortinet endpoint update and executed through FortiClient-managed VPN scripting workflows, according to Arctic Wolf researchers.

news.title: Humanix expands detection to identify live violations of security procedures
news.summary: Humanix has launched a capability to detect live violations of security procedures governing IT help desk and service desk workflows in real time. The system targets identity verification bypass attempts, where attackers pressure agents into skipping verification steps before fulfilling sensitive requests like credential resets.

news.title: Okta writes its own license to kill rogue AI agents
news.summary: Okta is developing a licensing framework to give organizations control over rogue or unauthorized AI agents, including the ability to disable them. CEO Todd McKinnon stated that customers such as ServiceNow are requesting an "off switch" capability for AI agents operating within their environments.

news.title: Software stocks wrap up best month since 2001 as talk of 'SaaSpocalypse' subsides
news.summary: Software stocks, including Okta, experienced their best monthly performance since 2001, with Okta seeing a record stock price increase. The gains were driven by investor confidence in AI software strategies rather than any specific IAM product or security development.

news.title: SailPoint、Claude Compliance APIとの統合を発表、AIプラットフォーム向けにエンタープライズ グレードのアイデンティティ セキュリティを提供
news.summary: SailPoint announced an integration with Anthropic's Claude Compliance API to deliver enterprise-grade identity security for AI platforms. This press release is a Japanese-language translation of the original May 21, 2026 announcement published on SailPoint's website.

news.title: What did Okta report about agentic AI demand? #tech
news.summary: Okta reported Q1 revenue of $765M, up 11% year over year, beating analyst expectations of $752M. The company attributed part of the demand growth for its identity tools to the rise of agentic AI.

news.title: Threat Actors Exploit Critical FortiClient EMS Flaw to Deploy Credential Stealer
news.summary: Threat actors are actively exploiting a critical vulnerability in Fortinet's FortiClient Endpoint Management Server (EMS) to deploy credential-stealing malware across managed endpoints. The attackers disguised the credential stealer as a legitimate Fortinet endpoint component, abusing trusted endpoint management infrastructure to distribute the payload.

news.title: Microsoft Slams Public Zero-Day Disclosures Amid GitHub Researcher Account Removal
news.summary: Microsoft publicly defended Coordinated Vulnerability Disclosure (CVD) after removing a GitHub researcher account belonging to Chaotic Eclipse, who had publicly disclosed multiple zero-day vulnerabilities without prior vendor notification. The dispute centers on Microsoft's stance that researchers should give vendors time to address vulnerabilities before public disclosure.

news.title: ThreatsDay Bulletin: Claude Security Plugin, Azure Priv-Esc, Kali365 MFA Bypass, FIFA Scams +15 More
news.summary: A security bulletin covers multiple threats including an Azure privilege escalation vulnerability, an MFA bypass technique called Kali365, and a Claude security plugin among 15+ other items. The MFA bypass and Azure privilege escalation components are directly relevant to IAM professionals, though the article appears to be a broad threat roundup rather than focused IAM coverage.

news.title: Okta tops estimates and raises outlook as SentinelOne slides on weak guidance
news.summary: Okta reported quarterly earnings that beat analyst estimates, causing shares to rise more than 6% in after-hours trading. The company also raised its financial outlook, signaling improved business performance for the IAM vendor.

news.title: Transforming our approach to sensitivity labels at Microsoft with Microsoft Entra - Inside Track Blog
news.summary: Microsoft has extended sensitivity labels to Microsoft Entra security groups using labels policy to control information sharing. The implementation enables secure self-service while preventing oversharing within Microsoft's own internal environment.

news.title: Okta tops first-quarter results on agentic AI demand
news.summary: Okta reported first-quarter financial results that exceeded expectations, driven by demand for agentic AI capabilities. CEO Todd McKinnon indicated the company is increasing resource allocation toward agentic AI tools as part of a long-term strategy.

news.title: Orchid Security targets AI agent sprawl with new identity governance tools
news.summary: Orchid Security has extended its Identity Control Plane platform with new capabilities specifically designed to govern AI agents. The company argues that existing IAM models are insufficient for AI agents that inherit authority from humans and machines, positioning the release as a response to AI agent sprawl.

news.title: Gartner® Names Keeper Security the Second Fastest-Growing Company in the Market Share Analysis: Security Software, Worldwide, 2025
news.summary: Gartner has named Keeper Security the second fastest-growing company in its Market Share Analysis: Security Software, Worldwide, 2025 report. The recognition highlights Keeper's PAM platform, KeeperPAM, along with KeeperAI and Keeper Forcefield products.

news.title: Microsoft’s new cloud PCs place AI agents under enterprise controls
news.summary: Microsoft announced Windows 365 for Agents, a cloud PC platform designed to run AI agents within secure enterprise environments. The platform places AI agents under enterprise controls, allowing organizations to manage how agents interact with applications, browsers, files, and enterprise systems using natural language directives.

news.title: Gartner(R)、Keeper Securityを全世界セキュリティソフトウェア市場の急成長企業第2位にランクイン
news.summary: Gartner ranked Keeper Security as the second fastest-growing company in the global security software market. Keeper Security is a PAM and enterprise password management vendor operating in the IAM space.

news.title: Bosses blinded by confidence about shadow AI use by workers
news.summary: An Okta survey found that more than half of organizations experienced an AI-related security incident or near miss in the past year, with bosses overconfident about their visibility into employee AI usage. The report highlights shadow AI as a growing concern, though the article is primarily focused on AI risk rather than Okta's IAM products or identity-specific findings.

news.title: MFA Prompt Bombing: Why Your Second Factor Isn't Saving You
news.summary: The article examines MFA prompt bombing attacks, where attackers bypass multi-factor authentication by flooding users with authentication requests until they approve one. The piece focuses on how this attack vector undermines traditional MFA security assumptions and targets workforce authentication systems.

news.title: Lawmakers Demand Answers as CISA Tries to Contain Data Leak
news.summary: A CISA contractor intentionally published AWS GovCloud keys and other agency secrets to a public GitHub account, resulting in a significant credential leak. Lawmakers from both chambers of Congress are demanding answers while CISA works to contain the breach and invalidate the exposed credentials.

news.title: AI Agents Are Shifting Identity Security Budget Dynamics
news.summary: New Omdia research examines how AI agent identities are creating distinct budget dynamics compared to traditional IAM projects. The research highlights the growing need to manage, secure, and govern AI agent identities as these projects proliferate across enterprises.

news.title: CISA Admin Leaked AWS GovCloud Keys on Github
news.summary: A CISA contractor exposed highly privileged AWS GovCloud account credentials and internal system access details in a public GitHub repository until this past weekend. The leaked files reportedly detailed CISA's internal software build, test, and deployment processes, representing a significant privileged credential and secrets management failure.

news.title: ‘Scattered Spider’ Member ‘Tylerb’ Pleads Guilty
news.summary: Tyler Robert Buchanan, a senior member of the cybercrime group Scattered Spider, pleaded guilty to wire fraud conspiracy and aggravated identity theft for his role in SMS phishing attacks in 2022. The attacks targeted at least a dozen major technology companies and resulted in the theft of tens of millions of dollars in cryptocurrency, with the group known for social engineering and SIM-swapping tactics to bypass authentication controls.

news.title: Russia Hacked Routers to Steal Microsoft Office Tokens
news.summary: Russian military intelligence hackers are exploiting vulnerabilities in older routers to harvest Microsoft Office authentication tokens from users across more than 18,000 networks. The campaign operates without deploying malware, instead silently siphoning authentication tokens to gain unauthorized access to targeted accounts.
